base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of menu_file_select_fds — a ui from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. FDS file-select — 'NAMAE DAY' with PLAYER-1/2/3 slots + 'NAMAE TOUROKU' (register name) + 'NAMAE KESU' (delete name). Japanese FDS save system. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: FDS file-select — 'NAMAE DAY' with PLAYER-1/2/3 slots + 'NAMAE TOUROKU' (register name) + 'NAMAE KESU' (delete name). Japanese FDS save system
